About Webmaster

TLDR

I'm young adult 23 at the moment, male living in eastern cental europe. I was diagnosed with aspergers at the age of 21, still struggling to find myself in this new reality. Failed computer science 2 times, currently doing weekend course in financial managment. IDK what i will do after finishing it but definitly not the think i'm studying.

Thing i enjoy

  • Games
  • Japanese media
  • Computers
  • Cats
